message:
feat(core): add durable state checkpoint/rollback subsystem for native mux (ft-3681t.2.5)

Implement persistent control-plane state with checkpoint/rollback semantics:
DurableStateManager with checkpoint creation, retention, auto-checkpointing,
rollback with pre-rollback snapshots, state diffing between checkpoints or
vs current registry, JSON serialization. Supports failure recovery, migration
safety, and auditability. 25+ inline tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
